heading: Appropriations; availability for payment of property damages
label: 1471 Appropriations; availability for payment of property damages
text: Appropriations for contingent expenses of the Department of the Interior shall be available, to the extent specified therein, for the payment of damages to private property (not to exceed $500 in any one case) caused by the negligent operation of motor vehicles under such appropriations.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 693 of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982
